Stacked 3D diamond shapes, data layers

34 - Donut

54 - Diamond Cut

New Variations (Geometric / Faceted)

71 - Prism Gem

Triangular gem, 4 faceted faces

72 - Hex Ring

Thick hexagon with hollow center

73 - Iso Stack

Two stacked isometric cubes

74 - Shield

Pentagon badge with hollow center

75 - Arrow Diamond

Vertical diamond, blue + pink split

76 - Facet Circle

Octagon ring, gradient fill

77 - Cube + Node

Isometric cube with center glow dot

78 - Tri Stack

Three overlapping triangles, layered

Refined & Inspired

79 - Aurora

Flowing light ribbons, elegant curves

80 - Infinity Gem

Two interlocking diamonds, endless

81 - Crystal Tower

Tall elegant gem, faceted faces

82 - Nested Diamonds

Ripple broadcast, 3 concentric squares

83 - Prism Refract

Light splitting through prism

84 - Orbital

Three orbital rings + core sphere

85 - Peak

Abstract mountain, dual peaks

86 - Warp

Portal tunnel, nested diamonds converging

Prism Variations

87 - Prism Glow

Glass prism + soft glow, 6-beam spectrum

88 - Prism Solid

Solid 3-face prism, wide color fan

89 - Prism Diamond

Diamond-shaped prism, curved spectrum

90 - Prism Minimal

Tiny prism, wide elegant beams

91 - Prism 3D

Isometric 3D prism, depth + spectrum

92 - Prism Arc

Curved rainbow arc from prism

93 - Prism Shatter

Faceted/shattered glass prism

94 - Prism Down

Centered prism, spectrum fans downward

Diamond Layers (08 Variations)

08 - Original

3 stacked diamonds, blue→indigo→pink

95 - Tight Stack

Closer spacing, compact feel + shadow

96 - Four Layers

4-layer depth, richer gradient

97 - Glow Layers

Soft glow between layers + center dot

98 - Wide Flat

Wider/flatter diamonds, horizontal emphasis

99 - Split Faces

Distinct left/right face colors per layer

100 - Wireframe

Outline only, connected side lines

101 - Rising Pyramid

Layers shrink upward, pyramid feel

102 - DB Blocks

Layers with visible side walls, 3D database

Polished 08 (Refined)

08 - Original

Base reference — 3 stacked diamonds

103 - Vivid

More saturated colors, bolder presence

104 - Facet

Left/right face color distinction per layer

105 - Gapped

Wider spacing between layers, breathing room

106 - Tall

Narrower diamonds, sharper vertical feel

107 - Soft

Softer opacity, premium/elegant feel

108 - Shadow

Drop shadows, floating layers effect

109 - Edge Lines

Thin bright edge highlights per layer

110 - Centered

Vertically centered, subtle ambient glow

Cube 26 Variations

26 - Original

Base reference — purple isometric cube

111 - Gradient

Blue→indigo→pink across faces

112 - Glow

Ambient glow + bright top edge lines

113 - Glass

Translucent glass effect, white reflections

114 - Luxe

Deep rich tones, premium shadow, bright crown

115 - Neon

Bright neon edge outlines, all edges visible

116 - Elegant

Bright top, deep dark sides, refined contrast

117 - Gem Cut

Faceted top face, blue-left / purple-right split

118 - Float

Floating cube with ground shadow + sparkle
